title: TranscriptoScope
description: TranscriptoScope is a local Windows-friendly Shiny application for differential expression analysis, functional enrichment, and ranked pathway analysis using established R and Bioconductor workflows.
notes: Users should cite the software release and the underlying statistical packages and biological resources used in their analysis, including DESeq2 and fgsea where applicable. The MIT license applies to TranscriptoScope source code and project-authored documentation, not third-party biological resources.
